channel.title: mainstream on New Wayland
channel.description: Recent content in mainstream on New Wayland

item.title: How the Job Guarantee Fixes Mainstream Macro
item.description: Last time we broke the mainstream macro model by adding some price competition to the mix. Here’s another run with the same parameters1 (Price Shopping Model) Yup, still very broken. Let’s add a Job Guarantee to this model and see how it controls the economy (Job Guarantee Model) And the problem is fixed. Full employment from day one, no poverty, wages and prices stabilised. All exactly by the book. This trace has a few of interesting artefacts in it that are worthy of note.

item.title: Revealed: The Simple Change That Breaks Mainstream Macro
item.description: As regular visitors to the New Wayland Discord Forum will know, I’ve been working on replicating a mainstream Baseline Model (Lengnick, Matthias. (2013). Agent-based macroeconomics: A baseline model. Journal of Economic Behavior & Organization. 86.10.1016/j.jebo.2012.12.021). There are quite a few issues with it technically but it is a good starting point. This is a model that strips away any part of reality that get in the way of demonstrating the mainstream outcome.
